name: coop-ai
description: Zero-clone code intelligence sidebar for VS Code

coopAI.defaultModel.description: Default model for CoopAI chat requests.

coopAI.llmProvider.description: LLM provider routed by the CoopAI API server.

coopAI.llm.enabled.description: Enable live LLM chat via the CoopAI API (/v1/chat).

coopAI.autocomplete.enabled.description: Enable inline ghost-text autocomplete in the editor.

coopAI.autocomplete.trigger.description: When to request inline completions: automatic debounce, manual hotkey only, or off.

coopAI.autocomplete.maxSuggestionLength.description: Maximum characters in a single inline suggestion.

coopAI.autocomplete.debounceMs.description: Pause after typing before auto-triggering a completion request.

coopAI.autocomplete.model.description: Autocomplete model: gpt35/haiku are fast presets. chat uses the same provider and model as Preferences (coopAI.llmProvider + coopAI.defaultModel).

coopAI.autocomplete.customModel.description: Model id when coopAI.autocomplete.model is custom.

coopAI.autocomplete.showMultipleSuggesti.description: Request and cycle multiple ranked suggestions (Alt+[ / Alt+]).

coopAI.autocomplete.requestTimeoutMs.description: Drop slow completion requests after this many milliseconds. Use 1500+ when autocomplete model is chat (e.g. gpt-4o).

coopAI.autocomplete.useFim.description: Use fill-in-the-middle (FIM) segments when the server supports Codestral or DeepSeek FIM.

coopAI.autocomplete.useGraphContext.description: Include indexed dependency graph context in inline completions (Pro plan).

coopAI.autocomplete.projectImports.description: Extra import paths to bias project-style completions.

coopAI.useCachedResponses.description: Reuse identical chat responses for 5 minutes.

coopAI.chat.sessionIdleMinutes.description: Minutes away from CoopAI before the sidebar opens on a fresh thread instead of restoring the last one. Prior threads stay in the thread list. Set to 0 to always restore the last thread.

coopAI.projectInstructions.enabled.description: Attach AGENTS.md on every chat turn (from your repo or a file you attach in Settings).

coopAI.includeSelection.description: Include the current editor selection in chat context.

coopAI.includeActiveFile.description: Include the active file path in chat context.

coopAI.apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the CoopAI cloud API (HTTPS only).

coopAI.jobsBaseUrl.description: Deprecated. Use coopAI.apiBaseUrl for chat, graph, and jobs on one host.

coopAI.defaultOwner.description: Default repository owner when no file context is available.

coopAI.defaultRepo.description: Default repository name when no file context is available.

coopAI.defaultBranch.description: Default branch when no file context is available.

coopAI.searchScope.mode.description: Lightning search and @ picker scope: active repo or a named collection.

coopAI.searchScope.collectionId.description: Collection id when searchScope.mode is collection.

coopAI.timezone.description: Timezone for Coop timestamps and quota reset labels. US options use PST/MST/CST/EST; European options use GMT offsets.

coopAI.defaultCodeHost.description: Fallback code host used only when a repo has no explicit provider. All connected code hosts are active; Coop auto-selects this from your connected hosts, so you normally don't set it manually.

coopAI.openRepoInEditor.description: When you pick a repository in CoopAI, open it in VS Code: prefer a local clone, fall back to GitHub Repositories (GitHub only), ask each time, or never.

coopAI.openRepoInNewWindow.description: When false (recommended), open the repo in this window so files appear in the center editor while CoopAI stays in the sidebar. When true, open the repo in a separate window.

coopAI.gitlab.baseUrl.description: GitLab API base URL (supports self-hosted instances).

coopAI.jira.baseUrl.description: Jira Cloud or self-hosted site URL for decision archaeology.

coopAI.repositories.description: Pinned remote repositories for the explorer.

coopAI.intent.debounce.fileSwitch.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before updating context after switching files.

coopAI.intent.debounce.selectionChange.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before fetching light context for a stable selection.

coopAI.intent.debounce.editorOpen.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before updating context for newly opened editors.

coopAI.intent.batching.enabled.description: Batch compatible context requests triggered close together.

coopAI.intent.batching.window.description: Batching window in milliseconds for compatible context requests.

coopAI.intent.batching.maxRequests.description: Maximum context requests to collect before executing a batch immediately.

coopAI.intent.rateLimit.expensiveThresho.description: Minimum quota fraction required for non-critical expensive context fetches.

coopAI.intent.rateLimit.cheapThreshold.description: Minimum quota fraction required for cheap context fetches.

coopAI.intent.rateLimit.fallbackToCache.description: Return cached context when rate limits prevent live fetching.

coopAI.intent.prioritization.enabled.description: Prioritize context fetches by user intent and request cost.

coopAI.intent.prioritization.useQueueSys.description: Use priority queues for context fetch scheduling.

coopAI.degradation.enableGracefulFallbac.description: Show best-effort context when integrations are degraded or offline.

coopAI.degradation.cacheRetention.fresh.description: Fresh cache retention in decimal days.

coopAI.degradation.timeouts.critical.description: Timeout in milliseconds for critical integration calls.

coopAI.degradation.timeouts.normal.description: Timeout in milliseconds for normal integration calls.

coopAI.degradation.timeouts.background.description: Timeout in milliseconds for background integration calls.

coopAI.degradation.notifyUser.description: Show webview notifications for degraded integrations and cached results.

coopAI.degradation.userNotificationLevel.description: Minimum severity for graceful degradation notifications.

coopAI.conflicts.detectAndSurface.description: Detect source conflicts and surface them in the CoopAI chat UI.

coopAI.conflicts.autoResolve.description: Automatically compute authoritative values for detected source conflicts.

coopAI.conflicts.severityThreshold.description: Minimum conflict severity to show in the UI.

coopAI.conflicts.trustOrder.ownership.description: Preferred source order for ownership conflicts.

coopAI.conflicts.trustOrder.decision.description: Preferred source order for decision conflicts.

coopAI.conflicts.trustOrder.implementati.description: Preferred source order for implementation conflicts.

coopAI.conflicts.auditTrail.description: Record detected conflicts and user actions in an in-memory audit trail.

coopAI.devMode.description: Internal development only. When true, exposes Lightning local indexing backend and related UI for testing. Leave false for production.

coopAI.license.plan.description: Subscription plan (devMode only). Production plan comes from the Coop API (/v1/me).

coopAI.lightning.enabled.description: Enable Deep-Code Graph indexing. When false, chat uses local file and integration context only.

coopAI.lightning.autoIndexOnEnable.description: Automatically build indexes when Lightning Mode is enabled for a repository.

coopAI.lightning.backend.description: Lightning index backend (Pro). Defaults to Coop cloud. Local machine indexing is only available when coopAI.devMode is true.

coopAI.lightning.maxDiskGb.description: Soft disk usage limit (GB) for Lightning Mode local indexing (coopAI.devMode only).

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview && npm run build:backend && npm run build:workers && npm run build:admin
scripts.test:operator: npx tsx src/server/operatorApi.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/authMiddleware.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/operators/operatorAuthConfig.test.ts
scripts.lint: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.webview.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json
scripts.test:patch: npx tsx src/edit/patchParser.test.ts && npx tsx src/edit/patchApplier.test.ts
scripts.test:agent-routing: npx tsx src/chat/agentRouting.test.ts && npx tsx src/chat/editSendRouting.test.ts
scripts.test:auth: npx tsx src/server/auth/passwordCrypto.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/freeSignupApi.test.ts
scripts.test:project-instructions: NODE_OPTIONS='-r ./scripts/vscode-test-stub.cjs' npx tsx src/context/projectInstructionsStatus.test.ts && NODE_OPTIONS='-r ./scripts/vscode-test-stub.cjs' npx tsx src/webview/lib/agentsMdStatus.test.ts
scripts.test:codegen: npm run test:patch && npm run test:agent-routing && npx tsx src/context/repoSemanticRetrieval.test.ts && npx tsx src/api/agent/AgentOrchestrator.test.ts && npx tsx src/api/agent/tools/registry.test.ts && npm run test:autocomplete && npm run build:extension
scripts.test:inline-completion: npx tsx src/api/inlineGraphContext.test.ts && npx tsx src/api/inlineCompletionApi.test.ts
scripts.test:autocomplete: npx tsx src/config/inlineModelPresets.test.ts && npx tsx src/chat/buildRepoId.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/autocompleteConfig.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/autocompletePersistence.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/coopAutocompleteProvider.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/copilotCoexistence.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/triggerDetector.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/completionFilter.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/contextAnalyzer.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/hotStreak.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/smartThrottle.test.ts && npx tsx src/autocomplete/completionRouter.test.ts
scripts.test:sso: npx tsx src/server/auth/sessionDelivery.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/enterpriseApi.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/sso/x509Cert.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/sso/samlService.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/sso/samlApi.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/auth/userAuthApi.policy.test.ts
scripts.test:integration-scope: npx tsx src/server/resolveIntegrationScope.test.ts && npx tsx src/integrationScope/slackQuery.test.ts && npx tsx src/integrationScope/atlassianQuery.test.ts && npx tsx src/integrationScope/notionQuery.test.ts && npx tsx src/integrationScope/googleDocsQuery.test.ts && npx tsx src/context/integrationScopeContext.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/slackAppService.test.ts && npx tsx src/api/slack/slackClient.scopePicker.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/codeHostCredentialResolver.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/codeHostConnectors/routingGithubConnector.test.ts && npx tsx src/server/adminIntegrationsHealth.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:integration-scope && npm run test:sso && npm run test:user-facing-errors
scripts.test:estate-indexing: npm run test:indexed-repo-quota && npm run test:estate-sync && npm run test:lightning-search-scope && npm run test:graph-search-scope && npm run test:org-api-indexing && npm run test:org-api-index-rate-limit && npm run test:repo-symbol-index && npm run test:embeddings-client && npm run test:embedding-rate-limiter && npm run test:error-handling && npm run test:indexing-progress && npm run test:user-facing-errors
scripts.seed:repo-access-demo: npm run build:admin && docker compose cp dist/admin-org.js api:/app/dist/admin-org.js && docker compose exec -T -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://coop:coop@postgres:5432/coopai api node dist/admin-org.js seed-repo-access-demo
scripts.seed:pro-onboarding: npm run build:admin && docker compose cp dist/admin-org.js api:/app/dist/admin-org.js && docker compose exec -T -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://coop:coop@postgres:5432/coopai api node dist/admin-org.js seed-pro-onboarding
scripts.seed:governance-demo: npm run build:admin && docker compose cp dist/admin-org.js api:/app/dist/admin-org.js && docker compose exec -T -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://coop:coop@postgres:5432/coopai -e CREDENTIALS_ENCRYPTION_KEY=change-me-to-a-long-random-secret api node dist/admin-org.js seed-governance-demo
scripts.seed:analytics-demo: npm run build:admin && docker compose cp dist/admin-org.js api:/app/dist/admin-org.js && docker compose exec -T -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://coop:coop@postgres:5432/coopai -e CREDENTIALS_ENCRYPTION_KEY=change-me-to-a-long-random-secret api node dist/admin-org.js seed-analytics-demo
scripts.seed:enterprise-sso-demo: npm run build:admin && docker compose cp dist/admin-org.js api:/app/dist/admin-org.js && docker compose exec -T -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://coop:coop@postgres:5432/coopai -e CREDENTIALS_ENCRYPTION_KEY=change-me-to-a-long-random-secret -e COOP_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8787 -e COOP_ADMIN_PORTAL_URL=http://localhost:3001 api node dist/admin-org.js seed-enterprise-sso-demo
